nodes.label: Query: Why SDTD Human Workflow connects to 3D Viewer BOM SVG CAD
nodes.author: graphify

nodes.label: Graph After ES6 Refactor: 135 Nodes 240 Edges
iframe postMessage Integration Strategy
nodes.author: Alejandro Zubieta
nodes.rationale: Chosen for quick Phase 1-4 integration; later phases migrate to direct ES module imports. Avoids bundler requirement while enabling cross-project communication.

nodes.label: postMessage sstd-event/sstd-command Protocol
nodes.author: Alejandro Zubieta
nodes.rationale: Custom message protocol for cross-frame communication: sstd-event (child to parent) and sstd-command (parent to child). Actions: select, highlight, focus, clear.

nodes.label: Model3DModule Bridge Pattern
nodes.author: Alejandro Zubieta
nodes.rationale: model3d.js serves as bridge between SDTD platform and 3D viewer iframe. Translates postMessage events to/from EventBus.

nodes.label: Copy-per-Project Architecture
nodes.rationale: Each new project is a complete independent copy of a template, not a shared central engine. Chosen to ensure deliverable independence for clients.

nodes.label: Composer Hotspot onmousemove Extraction
nodes.rationale: Real part code lives in SVG hotspot onmousemove attribute (tooltip ShowToolTip). This is the reliable source for component identification.

nodes.label: ES6 Module Refactor
nodes.rationale: Replaced global script order dependency with explicit ES6 import/export. Eliminates fragile load-order bugs. Single entry point.

nodes.label: EventBus Phase 2 Design
nodes.rationale: Replace direct method calls with publish/subscribe via EventBus. Allows adding new viewers without modifying existing services.

nodes.label: Formspree Modal Quote System
nodes.rationale: Replaced mailto: with Formspree modal because mailto depends on user having a default email client configured. Formspree works without backend.

nodes.label: ES Module Direct 3D Integration
nodes.rationale: 3D viewer integrated as direct ES module (not iframe) using Three.js via CDN import map. Chosen after deciding iframe approach added unnecessary complexity.

nodes.label: BOM Intersection Filter Rationale
nodes.rationale: BOM displays only components in both SVG hotspots and Excel data. Ensures displayed parts are visually interactive and commercially validated.

nodes.label: BOM Watcher Rationale
nodes.rationale: DataManager polls components.json every 3 seconds, compares hash, triggers rebuild on change. Enables live Excel-to-App updates.

nodes.label: STEP as Indispensable Link
nodes.rationale: STEP is the indispensable link connecting GLB (visual, no part names) with Excel (BOM, no hierarchy). GLB nodes are named NAUO# without part numbers.

nodes.label: Structural Isomorphism Matching
nodes.rationale: GLB nodes mapped to STEP parts by counting level-1 children. Both have 77 level-1 nodes with 100% isomorphic child counts.
